title: Abnormal expression of splicing regulators RBFOX and NOVA is associated with aberrant splicing patterns at the Neurexin-3 gene in a monogenic autism spectrum disorder
authors: Forti PKK, Depieri LL, Hernandes BB, Bueno JGR, Giorgiani LA, Vercosa GD, Vasconcelos IC, Bengtson MH, Carazzolle MF, Camargo AP, Papes F
autism_relevance: MEDIUM - Pitt-Hopkins Syndrome (TCF4 haploinsufficiency); iPSC-derived neurons and organoids; RBFOX/NOVA family splicing alterations; NRXN3 isoform dysregulation. TCF4 and RBFOX1 are in the project gene list.
accession_verified: NO - bioRxiv egress blocked; data availability statement not inspected
decision: DEFER_TO_RYAN - flag for manual check of data availability section
